This plugin publishes a timestamp for when a external camera system was triggered by the FCU. Sequence ID from the message and the image sequence from camera can be corellated to get the exact shutter trigger time.

brief: Plugin to handle sending OBSTACLE_DISTANCE_3D MAVLink messages.

description: Sends odometry data to the FCU estimator and publishes odometry data that comes from FCU. This plugin is following ROS REP 147. Pose is expressed in parent frame. (Quaternion rotates from child to parent) The twist is expressed in the child frame. @see odom_cb()	transforming and sending odometry to fcu @see handle_odom()	receiving and transforming odometry from fcu

description: This plugin allows publishing rangefinder sensor data from Ardupilot FCU to ROS.

Adds support for MAVLink SIM_STATE (id 108) messages and republishes fields to ROS 2 topics. Intended for simulation use as a high-accuracy ground-truth feed when developing autonomy. Currently verified with ArduCopter SITL. Published topics (relative to plugin namespace): - ~/attitude (sensor_msgs/Imu): orientation (ENU/base_link) and angular velocity - ~/acceleration (geometry_msgs/Vector3Stamped): linear accel (m/s^2) in ENU/map - ~/velocity_body (geometry_msgs/TwistStamped): linear+angular velocity in base_link - ~/velocity_local (geometry_msgs/TwistStamped): linear+angular velocity in ENU/map - ~/global_position (sensor_msgs/NavSatFix): WGS84 lat/lon/alt with optional covariance

publishers.name: ~/attitude
publishers.description: IMU attitude publisher (~/attitude): orientation and angular velocity in ENU/base_link

publishers.name: ~/acceleration
publishers.description: Linear acceleration publisher (~/acceleration): ENU/map, units m/s^2

publishers.name: ~/velocity_body
publishers.description: Body-frame twist publisher (~/velocity_body): base_link linear+angular velocity

publishers.name: ~/velocity_local
publishers.description: Local-frame twist publisher (~/velocity_local): ENU/map linear+angular velocity

description: This plugin allows publishing of terrain height estimate from FCU to ROS.

This plugin is intended to publish MAV vibration levels and accelerometer clipping from FCU.
Send pose estimation from various vision estimators to FCU position and attitude estimators.
Send velocity estimation from various vision estimators to FCU position and attitude estimators.
This plugin allows computing and publishing wheel odometry coming from FCU wheel encoders. Can use either wheel's RPM or WHEEL_DISTANCE messages (the latter gives better accuracy).
